title: EGI Shared Database — Minimal Fields v1
description: Canonical field set for any Ephemeral Generative Interface (EGI) record. Every conforming implementation MUST persist at least these fields. Ref: AEROSPACEMODEL-MCC-SPEC-010 §7

decay_policy.title: Decay Policy
decay_policy.description: Describes how the Ephemeron fades during the Dissolution phase. The envelope function, half-life, and terminal condition are all captured here.

envelope_type.description: Shape of the decay envelope 𝒟(t).

half_life_ms.description: Time in milliseconds for intensity to drop to 50% of Bloom-end value. null when envelope_type is 'custom'.

terminal_vector.description: Target emotive vector at t_dissolution. Per Rule E-007, MUST be [0,0,0,0,0,0].

custom_ref.description: URI or identifier for custom decay function definition. Required when envelope_type is 'custom'.

reactivation_conditions.title: Reactivation Conditions
reactivation_conditions.description: Criteria under which a dissolved Ephemeron may be re-nucleated with a new lifecycle.

allowed.description: Whether reactivation is permitted for this record.

trigger.description: Event or condition that initiates reactivation (e.g. 'observer_present', 'schedule', 'manual').

max_reactivations.description: Maximum number of reactivation cycles. null = unlimited.

cooldown_ms.description: Minimum interval in milliseconds between dissolution and next nucleation.

provenance.title: Record Provenance
provenance.description: Origin and audit metadata for the EGI record.

created_by.description: Identifier of the system or agent that created this record.

spec_version.description: Version of the EGI specification this record conforms to (e.g. '0.1.0').

source_document.description: Reference to the originating specification or document.

interface_id.description: Unique identifier for the Ephemeron record. Format: EGI-<MODE>-<SEQUENCE>.

channel.description: SENSORIUM channel whose onset constitutes part of the trigger.

onset_order.description: Ordinal position in the nucleation onset sequence.

onset_delay_ms.description: Delay in milliseconds from nucleation start to this channel's activation.

trigger_patterns.description: Ordered channel activation pattern that encodes σ during the Nucleation phase.

seed_reference.description: Reference to the 256-bit seed σ that determines the generation function 𝒢. May be an opaque token, a vault URI, or a hex-encoded value.

simplex_dimension.description: Dimension of the simplicial complex formed by active channels (0 = single channel, 5 = all six channels).

active_channels.description: Set of SENSORIUM channels that participate in this Ephemeron.

betti_numbers.description: Betti numbers [β₀, β₁, …] characterising the topological signature of the channel coupling.

simplicial_signature.description: Topological fingerprint of the Ephemeron's multi-channel coupling structure.

bloom_fraction_min.description: Minimum fraction of total lifecycle that the Bloom phase must occupy (Rule E-003).

nucleation_ceiling.description: Maximum channel intensity during Nucleation (Rule E-006).

crc_resolution.description: Quantisation resolution for dissolution CRC encoding (Rule E-004).

lifecycle_range_ms.description: Permitted lifecycle duration range [min_ms, max_ms] for this Ephemeron mode.

assembly_rules.description: Structural constraints governing how the Ephemeron is assembled from lifecycle phases.

sensorium.description: True if ε(t) is a valid SENSORIUM state at every instant (Rule E-005).

traumacodedrama.description: True if Bloom transitions comply with TRAUMACODEDRAMA rules (Rule E-005).

compatible_modes.description: List of canonical EGI mode identifiers this record is compatible with.

cross_model_compatibility.description: Declares cross-layer and cross-mode compatibility per the three-layer encoding stack.
